languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно и запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно и запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, к нам обратились {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Эксплораторы{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Генеторы{/g} Адептус Механикус выработали теорию, что Погонщицы были созданы искусственно и запрашивают разрешение на исследования флоры и фауны Заркова. Трое техножрецов готовы возглавить исследовательскую конгрегацию".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created, and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

languages.text: 「艦長、探検隊から接触がありました。機械神殿の遺伝子学者たちは、ドローバーは人工的に作られたと理論を立てました。彼らのマギ・バイオロギストがザルコフの動植物を研究する許可を求めています。3人のテク・プリーストが研究の指導者として準備しています」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, we have been approached by the Explorators. Adeptus Mechanicus Genetors have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created. Now their Magi Biologis are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、探検隊から接触がありました。機械神殿の遺伝子学者たちは、ドローバーは人工的に作られたと理論を立てました。彼らのマギ・バイオロギストがザルコフの動植物を研究する許可を求めています。3人のテク・プリーストが研究の指導者として準備しています。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, los {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}exploradores{/g} han contactado con nosotros. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetores{/g} del Adeptus Mechancus han propuesto la teoría de que los Pastores son creaciones artificiales y solicitan permiso para estudiar la flora y fauna de Zarkov. Tienen tres tecnosacerdotes listos para liderar la congregación investigadora».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, los {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}exploradores{/g} han contactado con nosotros. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetores{/g} del Adeptus Mechancus han propuesto la teoría de que los Pastores son creaciones artificiales y solicitan permiso para estudiar la flora y fauna de Zarkov. Tienen tres tecnosacerdotes listos para liderar la congregación investigadora».

languages.text: “大人，{g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}开拓者{/g}已与我们进行接洽。机械修会的{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}提出了一种理论，认为拒生花是人造产物。现在，他们正在申请许可，打算对扎尔科夫的动植物群落展开研究。目前已有三位技术神甫准备率领研究团队开展调查。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: “大人，{g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}开拓者{/g}已与我们进行接洽。机械修会的{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}提出了一种理论，认为拒生花是人造产物。现在，他们正在申请许可，打算对扎尔科夫的动植物群落展开研究。目前已有三位技术神甫准备率领研究团队开展调查。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, die {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Exploratoren{/g} haben sich an uns gewandt. Einer Theorie der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetoren{/g} des Adeptus Mechanicus zufolge wurden die Treiber künstlich erschaffen. Sie bitten um die Erlaubnis, die Flora und Fauna von Zarkov zu studieren. Drei Techpriester stehen bereit, um die Forschungskongregation anzuführen."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, die {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Exploratoren{/g} haben sich an uns gewandt. Einer Theorie der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetoren{/g} des Adeptus Mechanicus zufolge wurden die Treiber künstlich erschaffen. Sie bitten um die Erlaubnis, die Flora und Fauna von Zarkov zu studieren. Drei Techpriester stehen bereit, um die Forschungskongregation anzuführen."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Keşiftörler{/g} bizimle temasa geçti. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetörleri{/g}, Çobanların yapay olarak yaratıldığına dair bir teori geliştirdi. Şimdi Zarkov'un florasını ve faunasını incelemek için izin talep ediyor. Hazırda araştırma cemaatine liderlik edebilecek üç Tekno Rahip var."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetors{/g} have developed a theory that the Drovers were artificially created and now they are requesting permission to study the flora and fauna of Zarkov. Three Tech-Priests are ready to lead the research congregation."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Keşiftörler{/g} bizimle temasa geçti. Adeptus Mechanicus {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetörleri{/g}, Çobanların yapay olarak yaratıldığına dair bir teori geliştirdi. Şimdi Zarkov'un florasını ve faunasını incelemek için izin talep ediyor. Hazırda araştırma cemaatine liderlik edebilecek üç Tekno Rahip var."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons été contactés par les {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}explorators{/g}. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetors{/g} de l'Adeptus Mechanicus pensent que les Chasseurs pourraient être des créations artificielles et demandent l'autorisation d'étudier la flore et la faune de Zarkov. Trois technoprêtres se sont portés volontaires pour diriger la congrégation de chercheurs. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we have been approached by the {g|Encyclopedia:ExploratorsGlossary}Explorators{/g}.
